# Rutinario

> Bilingual workout tracker for gym routines. Built with Jekyll and vanilla JS.

## Pages

- [Home](https://rutinario.app/): App hub with routine list and setup instructions
- [Full Body Routine](https://rutinario.app/routines/fullbody/): Compound-focused full body routine
- [Push Pull Legs Routine](https://rutinario.app/routines/ppl/): Three-day split by movement pattern

## Behavior

- Tracks exercise completion in the browser with weekly history
- Works in English and Spanish
- Supports installable/offline usage through a manifest and service worker
